creator: seki@sysrap.cs.fujitsu.co.jp
text:
I invoked send-pr command to report a bug.
	I found that the "Release:" line generated by send-pr
	command incorrectly stated the system version as follows:

		>Release:        FreeBSD 2.0-BUILT-19950603 i386

	It should be

		>Release:	FreeBSD 2.0.5-RELEASE i386

Fix: 

Not sure.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Invoke send-pr.
